welcome:
👋 Hi! I'm your WhatsApp Business assistant. Tell me what you'd like to do with your contacts, messages, or templates.

Examples:
  • "Add contact +55 11 98765-4321 named Ana Beatriz, tag as new-customer, and send the welcome_message template"
  • "List all available message templates"
  • "Find contacts tagged VIP"

Type 'exit' to quit.
plan.header: 📋 Here's what I'm planning to do:
plan.confirm: This plan includes actions that modify data. Proceed? (yes/no)
plan.cancelled: Plan cancelled. What else can I help you with?
plan.partial: ⚠️ {{completed}} of {{total}} steps completed. Stopped due to error.
agent.max_iterations: I've reached the maximum number of reasoning steps. Please try rephrasing your request.
error.llm: Sorry, I encountered an error communicating with the AI service. Please try again.
error.llm_auth: The AI service rejected our credentials. Please check your API key configuration.
error.llm_rate_limit: The AI service is temporarily busy. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.llm_overloaded: The AI service is currently overloaded. Please try again in a few minutes.
error.llm_timeout: The AI service took too long to respond. Please try again.
error.wati: Something went wrong while communicating with the WhatsApp API. Please try again.
error.wati_auth: The WhatsApp API rejected our credentials. Please check your WATI configuration.
error.wati_not_found: The requested resource was not found in the WhatsApp API ({{resource}}).
error.wati_timeout: The WhatsApp API took too long to respond. Please try again.
error.wati_rate_limit: Too many requests to the WhatsApp API. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
web.subtitle: Tell me what you'd like to do with your WhatsApp Business account
web.welcome: 👋 Hi! I'm your WhatsApp Business assistant. Tell me what you'd like to do with your contacts, messages, or templates.
web.example1: Add contact +55 11 98765-4321 named Ana Beatriz, tag as new-customer, and send the welcome_message template
